page_metadata.biotools__summary: PathExpand is a methodology for extending pre-defined protein sets representing cellular pathways and processes by mapping them onto a protein-protein interaction network, and expanding them to include densely interconnected interaction partners.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PathExpand is a methodology for extending pre-defined protein sets representing cellular pathways and processes by mapping them onto a protein-protein interaction network, and expanding them to include densely interconnected interaction partners.
